entities.name: resume
entities.context: Described as a very narrow slice of who someone is; limited representation of career identity

entities.name: career stories
entities.context: Accumulated experiences that become difficult to recall retrospectively without tracking

entities.name: authentic context
entities.context: Real longitudinal data about a person vs fake context claimed by other apps

entities.name: career tracking
entities.context: Practice of recording career experiences over time; value recognized retrospectively

entities.name: career tech apps
entities.context: Apps attempting to solve career problems, criticized for solving non-problems and lacking authentic context

relationships.context: Resume is a narrow slice while career stories represent fuller picture
Other apps criticized for lying about having real context
Tracking enables capture of career stories before they become difficult to recall
